# Pull Request

## What's in this PR
<!-- One sentence: questions added? bug fix? new adapter? -->

## For question contributions

- **Source / license:** <!-- e.g. OpenStax CC-BY-4.0, hand-authored MIT, llm-generated reviewed -->
- **Sample IDs for spot-check:** <!-- list 3-5 IDs reviewers should look at -->
- **Counts:** <!-- e.g. +12 algebra/medium, +8 fractions/easy -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `houseofmath validate` passes locally
- [ ] `pytest` passes locally
- [ ] Every new question has a non-empty `explanation`
- [ ] Every new question lists `source` and `license`
- [ ] No direct edits to `Question Bank/_pending/` (use `houseofmath promote`)
